description: Status of 2027 party primaries — as of May 2026. Very early; most parties have not scheduled primaries.

data.notes: APC officially endorsed Tinubu for re-election in May 2025. Formal primary not yet announced.
ADC is now the home of both Peter Obi and Atiku Abubakar. Internal primary to determine candidate not yet announced.
With Atiku moved to ADC, PDP's 2027 presidential candidate is unknown. Party in internal restructuring.
Kwankwaso likely candidate but no formal primary announced.

gaps.note: States holding 2027 governorship elections not yet known which primaries scheduled.
No primary info yet for any legislative seat.
